Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a Press Release dated February 08, 2013 titled "Hindalco Announces Q3 FY 2012-13 Standalone Results [Unaudited]".

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that due to continuation of illegal strike by workmen at Company's Silvassa plant, the Company is forced to declare a lock-out there. The Company do not expect any adverse impact on the Company's financials due to the aforesaid lock-out.
Hindalco Industries Limited has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the period ended March 31,2013.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated May 28, 2013, titled "Hindalco reports Standalone and Consolidated audited results for year ended March 31, 2013".

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held on May 28, 2013 has recommended the payment of Dividend on Equity Shares of the Company for the Financial Year commencing on April 01, 2012 upto March 31, 2013, to the Equity Shareholders @ Rs. 1.40 per Equity Share of the face value of Re. 1/- each. i.e. 140% per share subject to shareholders and other approvals.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that for the purpose of Interest payment on the following Series of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures, the Company has fixed July 25, 2013 as Record Date.  ISIN No - INE038A07274.

Hindalco Industries Ltd has informed the Exchange that the Register of Members & Share Transfer Books of the Company will remain closed from September 03, 2013 to September 10, 2013 (both days inclusive) for the purpose of Payment of Dividend & Annual General Meeting (AGM) of the Company to be held on September 10, 2013.    The Dividend on the Equity Shares, will be paid/dispatched to the Company s Equity Shareholders, on September 13, 2013.
Hindalco Industries Limited has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone Financial Results for the period ended June 30,2013.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that, at the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company held on August 13, 2013, Mr.Satish Pai has been appointed as an Additional and Whole-time Director on the Board of the Company.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange vide letter dated September 20, 2013, regarding "Allotment of 15,00,00,000 equity shares against conversion of warrants to Promoter Group Companies".

Hindalco Industries Limited has submitted to the Exchange vide letter dated September 25, 2013 copy of disclosure pursuant to Regulation 13(4), 13(4A) and 13(6) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 1992.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board had approved Hindalco Industries Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme 2013 "the Scheme 2013" in the meeting held on May 28, 2013. The Shareholders of the Company in the Annual General Meeting held on September 10, 2013 also approved the Scheme 2013 and granting of Stock Options (comprising of Options and/or Restricted Stock Units) not exceeding 54,62,000 equity shares exercisable in to the same number of equity shares of Re. 1/- each at such price as may be fixed and determined by the Board of Directors and/or ESOS Compensation Committee as per relevant SEBI Guidelines. Further, ESOS Compensation Committee on October 09, 2013 has approved the Scheme 2013. The Committee has also granted 38,61,293 stock options exercisable in to the same number of equity shares of Re. 1 /- each to eligible employees of the Company.

Hindalco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the standalone Results for the quarter ended on 31-MAR-2014 as follows: Net Sales of Rs. 843506 lacs for the quarter ending on 31-MAR-2014 against Rs. 720096 lacs and Rs. 691559 lacs for the quarters ending on 31-DEC-2013 and 31-MAR-2013 respectively. Net Profit / (Loss) of Rs. 24815 lacs for the quarter ending on 31-MAR-2014 against Rs. 33398 lacs and Rs. 48203 lacs for the quarters ending on 31-DEC-2013 and 31-MAR-2013 respectively.
